backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining content sections, quiz questions, printable guides, and read‑only query methods for retrieving and filtering them.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requests to involved frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten short summaries describing the purpose of various frontend components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global CSS defining light and dark theme variables and base styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the app root and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring React Query and rendering header, content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main content container offering tabbed navigation for scanner, education sections, quizzes, and guides.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with attribution, branding, and an informational disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with app branding and pest identification title.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Provides informational content about identifying mice, signs of infestation, nesting materials, and common habitats.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays safety information and educational details about scorpion identification, species, signs, habitats, and behavior.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Photo scanner providing camera capture, file upload, editing tools, saving to gallery, and deletion/reset controls.
Displays downloadable PDF guides for a given quiz section, showing loading, empty, and guide list states with download functionality.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Renders a quiz for a section with question progression, answer selection, scoring, and completion feedback.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Shows a gallery of saved scans with timestamps and supports viewing and deleting individual scans with confirmation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Explains bed bug hiding spots, feeding behavior, and lifecycle with images and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Renders educational UI cards explaining how to identify bed bugs, their life stages, and bite marks with supporting images and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Displays guidance cards on preventing bed bugs, including travel precautions and used furniture inspection, with images and tips.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Provides heat‑treatment and dryer‑treatment instructions for eliminating bed bugs, including warnings and preparation steps.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, recreating it on identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Implements image‑editing state and operations such as rotation, zoom, enhancement, and exporting processed images.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, providing login, logout, and identity persistence through a React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, results, and printable guides using the authenticated backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: React hook managing saved scans in localStorage with load, save, delete, and lookup functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining light/dark OKLCH color variables and applying global background and text colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the main App.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Canvas-based utilities for rotating, enhancing, zooming, and cropping images from data URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH color theme, extended utilities, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking features, requirements, and state for a pest education and photo scanner app.
